creator: sue@welearn.com.au
text:
Same symptoms on a 4.0R pentium with different IRQ etc.
Checked with a 3.3R boot floppy and that works fine on this machine.
Kernel crash dump obtained, not yet submitted.

Similar panic also while attempting to install 4.0R (CD with
several remakes of floppy boot disks) to a 486 that ran 3.3R
very well both before and after the failed 4.0 install. (This
was a fresh install each time, not an upgrade.)

Feel free to contact sue@welearn.com.au for kernel trace
if you can offer a teensy bit of help to identify the
required info.

-- 

Regards,
        -*Sue*-
